conda env: dashboard-backend. Dev: npm run dev:all (auto-opens Edge). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. User expects Agent Team approach — don't tunnel-vision, execute full parallel agent plans. Data observations (items 8-12) are NOT issues. Cordoba != Cordova. Option C for old UW model attributes. Auth login uses form data (not JSON). docs/multifamily_data_guide.docx should NOT be deleted. User expects all tracking table rows to have commit hashes filled in. Settings.local.json: avoid ':*' mid-string in Bash rules. User wants auto-chaining: proceed to next wave immediately, don't wait for confirmation.

Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. Zod property schema: safeNum/safeStr/safeDateString with defaults (resilient parsing). SQLite tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. CRUD uses flush() not commit() — get_db() auto-commits at request boundary. Extraction endpoint run_in_executor wrapping is thread-unsafe with sync Session — don't do it. deals.py now a package: deals/__init__.py assembles sub-routers, fixed-path routes before parameterized. market_data/ uses _service.py for mock targeting. Filter utils use Any not Column for mypy compat with InstrumentedAttribute. Settings class split into 7 groups via multiple inheritance (backward-compatible). staleTime constants centralized in src/lib/constants/query.ts (STALE_TIMES object). Reporting types extracted from mock files to src/types/reporting.ts. fetchProperties defaults limit=200 to show all properties on Dashboard/Investments.

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. Quick Extraction and Group Pipeline are INDEPENDENT systems writing to same extracted_values table.
